title: Britain Is Still Deep in the Shadow of Brexit
summary_full: Ten years after a slim majority voted to leave the European Union, the economic and political effects of that decision continue to disrupt the United Kingdom.
summary_public: Ten years after a slim majority voted to leave the European Union, the economic and political effects of that decision continue to disrupt the United Kingdom.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: economic and political effects of that decision continue to disrupt the United Kingdom.
